title: Extendable Modern Wooden TV Stand Living Room Storage Furniture Adjustable Width 200-262cm Rich Walnut Finish Without Coffee Table

VERSATILE FUNCTIONALITY: TV stand includes open shelving and cabinet storage, while the matching coffee table offers hidden storage compartments for maximum utility
DIMENSIONS: Extended TV stand provides ample space for large televisions and display items
